press_releases.description: Joining hands with Inner Wheel Club of Kolkata New Gen
press_releases.summary: Inner Wheel is the world's largest voluntary women's organization, spread over 103 countries and particularly strong in India. Inner Wheel Club of Kolkata New Gen was formed.
press_releases.header: Dishari Partners with Inner Wheel Club of Kolkata New Gen to Support Youth Development Across WestBengal.
text: Dishari, an organization committed to uplifting the lives of children and women in the U.S. and India, proudly announced today its partnership with the Inner Wheel Club of Kolkata New Gen. a Kolkata based non-profit organization working to enhance the lives of women and Youth across rural West Bengal.

Inner Wheel is the world's largest voluntary women's organization, spread over 103 countries and particularly strong in India. Inner Wheel Club of Kolkata New Gen was formed in the year 2016, with the intention of bringing together younger minds to contribute for the greater good. They have done notable projects in almost all areas: Medical & Health, Women Empowerment, Environment, Education & Community Welfare.

We are thrilled to announce that Dishari Boston is joining hands with Inner Wheel club of Kolkata New Gen in this mission to uplift and empower children in West Bengal. This collaboration reflects our shared vision of building a more compassionate world and making a meaningful impact in the lives of children in India. In a heartfelt show of solidarity, Dishari has pledged an upfront donation to Inner Wheel of Kolkata New Gen.

This partnership is more than just financial support—it's a commitment to improve the lives of children, amplifying awareness, and drive real change through community engagement. Together, we aim to build a stronger, more compassionate community—one that stands united in hope, healing, and action.

While Agomoni - The Awakening celebrates the vibrant culture and heritage of Bengal, it will also shine a spotlight on the spirit of giving back. Every ticket purchased directly supports Dishari's charitable efforts, including the contribution to the Inner Wheel Club.

press_releases.summary: Dishari Partners with Alka Ohri Foundation to Support Women Battling Triple-Negative Breast Cancer Dishari, an organization committed to uplifting the lives of children and women.
press_releases.header: Dishari Partners with Alka Ohri Foundation to Support Women Battling Triple-Negative Breast Cancer
text: Dishari, an organization committed to uplifting the lives of children and women in the U.S. and India, proudly announced today its partnership with the Alka Ohri Foundation, a New Jersey based non-profit organization working to enhance the lives of women battling triple-negative breast cancer. This collaboration reflects our shared vision of building a more compassionate world and making a meaningful impact in the lives of women facing one of the toughest life-threatening challenges. In a heartfelt show of solidarity, Dishari has pledged an upfront donation to the Alka Ohri Foundation. In addition, a portion of ticket sales from our upcoming cultural event, Agomoni - The Awakening, will be donated to support this vital cause.

This partnership is more than just financial support—it's a commitment to empowering women, amplifying awareness, and driving real change through community engagement. Together, we aim to build a stronger, more compassionate community—one that stands united in hope, healing, and action.

While Agomoni - The Awakening celebrates the vibrant culture and heritage of Bengal, it will also shine a spotlight on the spirit of giving back. Every ticket purchased directly supports Dishari's charitable efforts, including the contribution to the Alka Ohri Foundation.

press_releases.summary: Celebrating the Season Through Generosity and Community Spirit
text: From festive celebrations to meaningful giving, the Dishari Holiday Party beautifully blended joy with compassion, reminding us of all that the true spirit of the season is found not only in celebration, but in caring for one another. Carrying this spirit forward, on the morning of December 29th, Dishari team members came together once again with a mission rooted in service—to deliver 160 pounds of donated food and essential items to the Franklin Food Pantry. This collective effort was much more than a simple drop-off; it was a reflection of the generosity, empathy, and unity that define the Dishari community.

Moments like these remind us that small acts of kindness, when combined, can create a truly meaningful impact. They also serve as inspiration for the next generation, showing young minds the value of community engagement, compassion, and supporting those who may need a helping hand. The photos from this initiative capture not only the impact of the contributions but also the heart behind them—smiles, teamwork, and a shared commitment to making a difference.

Dishari remains deeply committed to fostering a culture of giving—where celebration and service go hand in hand, and every initiative becomes an opportunity to strengthen the bonds within our community. We extend heart-felt gratitude to everyone who contributed, participated, and supported this effort. Your generosity made this possible, and your spirit continues to inspire.
